0.text: Linear density increases in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Linear consolidations in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Newly developed subpleural nodular ground glass opacities in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Newly developed subpleural nodular ground glass opacities in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

4.text: Several nonspecific nodules up to 5 mm in diameter in both lungs, largest in the left upper lobe

5.text: Increased pleural effusion measuring 32 mm in diameter on the left

6.text: Slightly increased pleural effusion measuring 11 mm in diameter on the right
